name: 群星陨落治疗
description: 星辰领域结束时为友方恢复生命
code: function executeSkill(context) { const battle = context.battle; const sourcePiece = context.sourcePiece; if (!sourcePiece) return { success: false }; const tracker = sourcePiece.statusTags ? sourcePiece.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.id === 'starfall-heal-tracker'; }) : null; const cardsUsed = tracker ? tracker.currentUses : 0; if (cardsUsed === 0) return { success: false }; const allies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.faction === sourcePiece.faction && p.currentHp > 0; }); let totalHeal = 0; allies.forEach(function(ally) { const result = healDamage(sourcePiece, ally, cardsUsed * 3, battle, 'starfall-heal'); totalHeal += result.heal; }); removeStatusEffectById(sourcePiece.instanceId, 'starfall-heal-tracker'); return { success: true, message: '群星陨落结束：根据使用的' + cardsUsed + '张手牌，友方共恢复' + totalHeal + '点生命' }; }
